title: Terms and Conditions
intro: Welcome to Allied Informatics. These Terms and Conditions govern your access to and use of our website and services. By using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

sections.heading: Use of Website and Services
paragraphs: You may use the website and services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You agree not to:
bulletItems: Violate local, state, or international law while using services.
Disrupt or interfere with the proper functioning of the website.
Transmit viruses, malware, or other harmful code.
Attempt unauthorized access to systems or related infrastructure.

sections.heading: Account Creation and Security
paragraphs: If you create an account, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of login information and all activity under your account. Please notify Allied Informatics immediately if you suspect unauthorized use.

sections.heading: Prohibited Conduct
bulletItems: Using services for illegal or fraudulent activity.
Activities that damage, disable, overburden, or impair the website or services.

sections.heading: Restrictions on Use
paragraphs: Allied Informatics may limit access, suspend, or terminate use of services where these terms are violated.

sections.heading: Liability Limitations
paragraphs: Allied Informatics, its affiliates, and employees are not liable for direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from website or service use. No warranty is made regarding completeness or reliability of website content.

sections.heading: SMS Disclosure
paragraphs: By providing your phone number, you agree to receive service-related and marketing text messages from Allied Informatics.
bulletItems: Message and data rates may apply based on your carrier plan.
Message frequency varies based on your interactions.
Reply STOP at any time to opt out.

sections.heading: Privacy Policy
paragraphs: Your use of services is also governed by our Privacy Policy: /privacy-policy.

sections.heading: Changes to Terms
paragraphs: We may update these terms at any time. Updates are posted on this page with a revised Last updated date.
